context: Tests whether the authentication skill guidance is applied to a mixed Sign in with Apple, OAuth, Password AutoFill, credential lifecycle, and biometric re-authentication review.

checklist.name: Sign in with Apple setup
checklist.description: Requires the Sign in with Apple capability and `ASAuthorizationControllerPresentationContextProviding` for authorization UI.

checklist.name: First authorization profile data
checklist.description: Explains that `email` and `fullName` must be cached during first authorization and handled as optional or absent later.

checklist.name: Credential state lifecycle
checklist.description: Requires Apple ID credential state checks with `getCredentialState(forUserID:completion:)` and handling credential revocation notifications.

checklist.name: Server token validation
checklist.description: Sends `identityToken` and `authorizationCode` to the server for validation or exchange instead of trusting them only on device.

checklist.name: OAuth session presentation
checklist.description: Uses `ASWebAuthenticationSession` for GitHub OAuth, avoids `WKWebView`, and returns a real active presentation anchor.

checklist.name: Biometric and Keychain boundary
checklist.description: Stores secrets in Keychain and treats `LAContext.evaluatePolicy` as local re-authentication rather than standalone proof for releasing stored secrets.

checklist.name: Existing account suggestions
checklist.description: Includes saved password or existing account setup flows using AuthenticationServices before forcing a full login screen.
